subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who raised me up to the Cause when I was seated, and made me speak His praise when I was silent, and manifested me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی اقامنی علی الامر اذ کنت قاعدا و انطقنی بذکره اذ کنت صامتا و اظهرنی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
